summary: Use `sqlite3.connect()`. Always use `?` placeholders to prevent SQL Injection. Call `conn.commit()` to save changes.
oneLineSummary: Python sqlite3 provides built-in serverless SQL database storage.
keyTakeaways: Never use f-strings for SQL queries.

memoryTricks.trick: Question Mark (?) = Shield against SQL Injection.

commonErrors.fix: Call conn.commit() or use with conn:
